HAUS OF BALLOONS — HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE
Create one copy of this workbook per client invoice. Keep the master unchanged.
Duplicate the master workbook and rename it with the client name and invoice number.
On the Invoice sheet, replace every yellow field: client, event, invoice number, issue date, location, scope, and lump-sum amount.
Select Vancouver or Toronto. The payment instruction updates automatically to the correct e-transfer email.
Confirm the Due date: it automatically calculates as seven days after the Issue date.
Export the Invoice sheet as a PDF and email it to the client.
Add or update the row in Invoice Register. Mark it Paid and enter the payment date once received.
Billing rules included in this template

• Currency: Canadian dollars (CAD)
• Tax: no tax added
• Service amount: one lump-sum amount
• Payment terms: seven days after receipt
• Payment: cash or e-transfer
• Vancouver: vancouver@hausofballoons.ca
• Toronto: toronto@hausofballoons.ca
Tip: when client volume grows, this same structure can be migrated into a CRM or accounting system.
